name: obs-propio
description: Plataforma de streaming multicámara interactiva para producciones deportivas

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd ui && npm install && cd ../bridge && npm install
scripts.build:core: cd core && mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. && cmake --build . --config Release
scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build:bridge && npm run build:ui
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on ui/dist/renderer/index.html && cross-env ELECTRON_START_URL=http://localhost:3000 electron ui/src/main/main.ts
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.clean: rimraf build dist node_modules core/build bridge/build ui/node_modules
scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm run build
